description: generate a publication-quality scientific schematic from a natural-language description via AI (Nano Banana 2), with iterative quality review by Gemini
rules: generative: produces an image file + a JSON review log under record_store
needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to OpenRouter (offline degrades gracefully)
max 2 refinement iterations; regenerates only if the quality score is below the doc-type threshold
DOC_TYPE selects the quality threshold (journal 8.5 .. presentation 6.5; default 7.5)
does not mutate any remote/live service — read-only with respect to infrastructure
usage: Set PROMPT (the diagram description), OUTPUT (image filename written under record_store), DOC_TYPE (quality threshold tier), and OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: the rendered image + <stem>_review_log.json.
limitation: Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY + network. Without them the op produces no image (the porter still emits an empty audit artifact and exits 0). Iterations are capped at 2.
